troparion.text: Only Creator, with wisdom profound, You mercifully order all things, / and give that which is needed to all men: / Give rest, O Lord, to the souls of Your servants who have fallen asleep, / for they have placed their trust in You, our Maker and Fashioner, and our God.

kontakion.text: With the saints give rest, O Christ, to the souls of Your servants, / where there is neither sickness nor sorrow, and no more sighing, / but life everlasting.

troparion.text:
(Podoben: “When the stone had been sealed...”)
O citizen of the desert and angel in the body,  /  you were shown to be a wonderworker, our God-bearing Father Auxentios;  /  through fasting, vigil, and prayer, you received heavenly gifts,  /  healing the sick, and the souls of those who run to you with faith.  / Glory to Him Who strengthened you.  / Glory to Him Who crowned you. / Glory to Him Who, through you, works healing for all!

kontakion.text: Delighting in abstinence, O divinely wise one,  / since you curbed the desires of the flesh, /  your faith was seen to increase;  / and you blossomed as a plant in the midst of Paradise, /  most sacred Father Auxentios.

saints.name: Repose of Saint Cyril, Equal of the Apostles and Teacher of the Slavs

troparion.text: Wisdom was your sister from birth; / you loved her, O voice of God, as a pure virgin / who adorned your soul and mind as a precious jewel, / so revealing you, O blessed man, to be another Cyril: / Wise in name and understanding!

saints.name: Venerable Isaac the Recluse of the Kiev Near Caves

troparion.text: By a flood of tears you made the desert fertile, / and your longing for God brought forth fruits in abundance. / By the radiance of miracles you illumined the whole universe! / O our holy father Isaac, pray to Christ our God to save our souls!

saints.name: Translation of the Relics of Martyrs Michael and his councilor, Theodore, of Chernígov

troparion.text: Blessed and revered Equals of the Apostles,  / you received crowns from Christ,  / for you were worthy of them, O godly-wise Michael and wondrous Theodore,  / entreat Him to grant peace to the world  / and great mercy to our souls.

kontakion.text: Having shone in Russia as luminaries,  / you repulsed the torments with rays of glory, O honored martyrs Michael and Theodore;  / therefore you cried out,  / “Nothing shall separate us from the love of Christ” (Romans 8:39).

saints.name: Venerable Maron the Hermit of Syria

troparion.text: By a flood of tears you made the desert fertile, / and your longing for God brought forth fruits in abundance. / By the radiance of miracles you illumined the whole universe! / O our holy father Maron, pray to Christ our God to save our souls!

saints.name: Saint Abraham, Bishop of Charres, Mesopotamia

troparion.text: In truth you were revealed to your flock as a rule of faith, / an image of humility and a teacher of abstinence; / your humility exalted you; / your poverty enriched you. / Hierarch Father Abraham, / entreat Christ our God / that our souls may be saved.

saints.name: Saint Hilarion the New of Georgia

troparion.text: By a flood of tears you made the desert fertile, / and your longing for God brought forth fruits in abundance. / By the radiance of miracles you illumined the whole universe! / O our holy father Hilarion, pray to Christ our God to save our souls!
